title: Solutions Engineer, Mid-Market
description:
We are hiring a Mid-Market Solutions Engineer to partner with sales teams during the technical sales cycle. You will lead technical discovery, build proof-of-concept integrations, run customer-specific demos, and translate customer requirements into product workflows.

Requirements:
- 4+ years in Solutions Engineering, Sales Engineering, or pre-sales technical roles
- Strong API integration experience (REST, JSON, webhooks)
- Comfort with SQL and basic data manipulation
- Experience with at least one CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot)
- Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Nice to have:
- Python or JavaScript experience
- Background in B2B SaaS
- Experience with workflow automation tools (Zapier, n8n, Make)
- Bilingual English/Spanish

We offer competitive compensation in the $130-160K base range plus equity and benefits.
